# Asset Catalog

## Scope

This catalog maps generated candidates and approved derived runtime output groups to intended game asset destinations.

## Status Values

| Status | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| Generated | Candidate exists but is not approved. |
| Approved for Expansion | Style/candidate direction can guide more production. |
| Approved for Game Asset | Explicitly approved candidate or derived output group for runtime use. |
| Godot Ready | Import recipe is complete. |
| Imported | Runtime files exist in approved asset paths. |
| Verified | Runtime use has been checked. |
| Rejected | Do not use. |
